## Summary

<!-- What does this PR do? Why? -->

## Type of change

- [ ] `feat:` New feature
- [ ] `fix:` Bug fix
- [ ] `docs:` Documentation
- [ ] `chore:` Maintenance / tooling
- [ ] `refactor:` Code change (no feature, no bug fix)
- [ ] `perf:` Performance improvement
- [ ] `test:` Tests only

## Checklist

- [ ] PR title follows `type(scope): description` format
- [ ] `npm run typecheck` passes
- [ ] Tested locally
